query: SELECT id, name, artistHandle, email FROM users WHERE name IN ('Aura Vessel','Nova Kaine','VLTG3','Ghost Lumen','Marco Spire','Lyric Haze','Seraph Cole','D-Rex') OR artistHandle IN ('Aura Vessel','Nova Kaine','VLTG3','Ghost Lumen','Marco Spire','Lyric Haze','Seraph Cole','D-Rex','aura-vessel','nova-kaine','vltg3','ghost-lumen','marco-spire','lyric-haze','seraph-cole','d-rex');
